content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported and `HMHomeManager()` instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift (App/WallpaperGridView.swift:3-6) but the app is a wallpaper browser with no home-automation UI or accessory features anywhere in the described views/metadata.

Pierre: Apple's HomeKit review checks that apps requesting the HomeKit entitlement actually provide home-automation functionality — using it for unrelated purposes (or leaving it unused, as here in a wallpaper app) is flagged as misuse and can trigger entitlement rejection. There's no home/accessory UI referenced in WallpaperGridView.swift or the description, so this looks like leftover/unnecessary code. Remove the HomeKit import, `HMHomeManager` instance, and the associated entitlement if home automation isn't a real feature, or otherwise justify it in App Review notes.
